channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Xi Jinping to host Vladimir Putin in Beijing following recent Trump visit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping is expected to host Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing this week, in a high-level diplomatic meeting taking place shortly after a recent visit by former US Presid...

item.title: Quebec and Newfoundland and Labrador Continue Negotiations on Churchill Falls Agreement
item.description: Quebec and Newfoundland and Labrador officials remain optimistic about reaching a mutually beneficial agreement regarding the Churchill Falls hydroelectric project. A recent report by a Newfoundland a...

item.title: Philippines rejects US diplomatic immunity request for New Clark City AI hub
item.description: The Philippines has rejected the United States’ request to grant diplomatic immunity for American personnel involved in the upcoming Artificial Intelligence (AI) hub in New Clark City, Tarlac. The AI ...

item.title: Negi Returns to Kapamilya Deal or No Deal Season 6 with Greater Confidence
item.description: Popular personality Negi made her second appearance on the hit ABS-CBN game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' hosted by Luis Manzano. This time around, she showed more confidence as she faced off again...

item.title: WHO declares global alert on Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in Central Africa
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared a Public Health Emergency of International Concern over the Ebola outbreak in central Africa, acting faster than usual by not waiting for the advice of...

item.title: Arsenal Clinch Premier League Title After Manchester City Draw Confirms Victory
item.description: Arsenal have officially emerged as champions of the English Premier League, ending a 22-year wait for the title. Their triumph was confirmed following a 1-1 draw between Manchester City and Bournemout...

item.title: Stephen Colbert’s Lasting Influence on American Political Satire
item.description: Stephen Colbert’s career, spanning his roles on 'The Daily Show,' 'The Colbert Report,' and 'The Late Show,' has significantly shaped American political satire. Unlike many satirists who merely commen...

item.title: Katie Price shares final messages from missing husband Lee Andrews as family seeks his safe return
item.description: Lee Andrews, husband of former glamour model Katie Price, has been reported missing in Dubai, prompting public concern from both his wife and his mother. The couple last communicated via text early on...

item.title: A Website Shows That Every Pokémon Has At Least One Fan
item.description: A new website called “Every Pokémon is Someone’s Favorite” demonstrates that every Pokémon, no matter how unpopular or unusual, has at least one dedicated fan. Users can select a Pokémon, write a shor...

item.title: Kenya Plans to Apply VAT to Electric Vehicles and Related Equipment
item.description: Kenya is set to apply the 16% value-added tax (VAT) to electric vehicles (EVs), lithium-ion batteries, and electric bicycles, reversing the tax incentives that previously supported the growing electri...

item.title: PNP-ACG arrests 52 individuals in cybercrime operations from May 1–15, 2026
item.description: From May 1 to 15, 2026, the Philippine National Police-Anti-Cybercrime Group (PNP-ACG) conducted intensive anti-cybercrime operations, resulting in the arrest of 52 individuals. Among those arrested, ...

item.title: Bacolod police colonel found dead at home, investigation ongoing
item.description: BACOLOD CITY, Philippines — A 55-year-old police colonel, Lt. Col. Romeo Vargas, serving as administrative officer of the Bacolod City Police, was found dead in his residence in Barangay Handumanan ye...

item.title: Arsenal Clinches Premier League Title After Manchester City Draw with Bournemouth
item.description: Arsenal has secured their first Premier League title in 22 years following a tense final stretch of the season. The Gunners, under the guidance of manager Mikel Arteta, finished the campaign strongly ...

item.title: Building Africa’s Digital Future: From Infrastructure to Innovation
item.description: In Kenya and across Africa, there is a clear shift from merely using technology to actively building it. The article explains that while apps, AI, fintech, and digital experiences capture headlines, t...

item.title: Four armed robbers target KZN family during midnight prayers, R35,000 stolen
item.description: In a shocking incident in Hazelmere, near Durban, four armed men disrupted a family's midnight prayer session and robbed them of three cellphones, additionally forcing one victim to transfer R35,000 f...

item.title: PM Modi arrives in Rome to strengthen India-Italy cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi arrived in Rome, Italy on May 19, 2026, marking the final leg of his five-nation European tour. He is scheduled to meet Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President...

item.title: Style and culture shine at Nedbank International Polo event
item.description: At the Nedbank International Polo event held recently, South Africa faced off against the United States in a thrilling match for a prestigious trophy. The highlight for many was the exclusive Nedbank ...

item.title: Iranian journalist stabbed in London in alleged proxy attack linked to Iranian state
item.description: An Iranian journalist and presenter for the opposition television channel Iran International has given evidence in court about a knife attack he suffered outside his home in Wimbledon, south-west Lond...

item.title: Nova Scotia Legislature Raises Pride Flag for International LGBTQ+ Awareness Day
item.description: Nova Scotia marked the International Day Against Homophobia, Transphobia, and Biphobia with a Pride flag-raising ceremony at the provincial legislature in downtown Halifax. NDP member Lisa Lachance, w...

item.title: Senator Questions Sean Duffy Over Funded Road Trip During Senate Hearing
item.description: During a Senate Committee on Appropriations hearing on May 19, 2026, tensions escalated as Senator Kirsten Gillibrand (D-NY) pressed U.S. Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy regarding his seven-mon...
